competitive_advantage_claims.differentiator: No LLM required; cites exact class/method/line; Block severity by default
Added-line != new-risk; suppresses move/restructure noise that inflates AI and static tools
Web/DI rules silenced on library/infrastructure repos
Fixed finding budget with severity ranking; avoids review fatigue from 40-finding dumps
Patch-local scenario text attached to high-risk conditional changes
